overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a red-haired character exploring a gothic castle during a stormy night. The character moves through dimly lit interior rooms with fireplaces and bookshelves, walks along exterior balconies with stone railings overlooking mountains, and ascends and descends spiral staircases.
